feedback: Strong execution. The hook subverts expectation immediately ('didn't get hacked... Bun just served it'). Personal terminal moment in paragraph 3 is the post's anchor — specific, vulnerable, stakes are real. The closing question is genuine and specific, not engagement-bait. Evidence grammar holds: facts first, then analysis ('None required a sophisticated exploit'), then personal uncertainty ('The part I can't shake'). Character count lands in the 1200-1500 sweet spot.

dimension_notes.voice: pass — 6+ first-person references, multiple fragments ('Not because someone was clever.'), no banned words or phrases, natural sentence-length variation throughout
dimension_notes.framing: pass — personal terminal moment grounds it, though the Axios/LiteLLM paragraph edges toward research-summary tone; the Bun thread stays the primary hook
dimension_notes.platform: pass — ~1380 chars, first 210 chars work as standalone hook, genuine specific closing question, URL present
dimension_notes.epistemic: pass — 'estimated 36%' qualifier used appropriately, uncertainty expressed personally ('The part I can't shake'), no overclaiming
dimension_notes.structure: pass — asymmetric paragraphs, burstiness present, no neat-bow closing, no rhythmic triads
dimension_notes.framework: pass — clear Nut-graf structure, facts > analysis > opinion order maintained, opinions flagged as personal throughout
